prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约1491→1793→2022→1764→2108，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约617名；2025年基准位次约2108名，较2024年明显后移344名 ，竞争持续加剧；该校在辽宁省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为81、81、83、86、86人，逐年小幅扩招后趋于稳定；2026年计划仍为86人，与2025年 持平，计划层面未产生额外竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年排名第21位，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲。 2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（生科院院长论文造假等），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36位（较 热），短视频曝光度中等偏上；2022年曾出现河南投档断档信号，但属外省个案，对辽宁影响有限；化学A+、数学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、统计学A等1 4个学科获A-及以上评级，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，与南开大 学物理类招生专业（工科试验班、理科试验班）高度契合，推高报考热度；辽宁省2026年物理类考生数估算约14.36万人，与2025年基本持平，考生规模未产生额外竞争变化；南开大学位于天津，与辽宁同属北方，地域偏好无明显偏向；该校在辽宁省招生占比约3.1%（2024年24人/全国759人），属 中等规模招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、学校顶尖层次带来的稳定吸引力、工科专业热度高涨以及声誉负面事件的有限抑制，在 2025年基准2108名基础上预计竞争继续小幅加剧；预测最低位次约2138名，区间1903–2373名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程）
- 理科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（物理学、量子信息科学、化学、生物科学）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学、数据科学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）（计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、信息安全、自动化、智能科学与技术、软件工程）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）（物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程）
- 理科试验班（数智经济金融）（数字经济、金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（物质科学）（化学、应用化学、生物科学、材料物理、材料化学）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 工科试验班（未来产业精英）（智能科学与技术、智能医学工程、新能源科学与工程、材料化学、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1903–2373名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1903名以内）可重点冲击一档伯苓班等王牌专业；位次接 近区间上限（2373名附近）应以三档专业保底为主，兼顾二档中位专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1491 → 1793 → 2022 → 1764 → 2108, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 617 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2108, a significant backward shift of 344 places compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 81, 81, 83, 86, and 86 students respectively, gradually expanding slightly and then stabilizing; the 2026 plan remains at 86 students, unchanged from 2025, so the plan itself does not create additional competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 21st in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, firmly among the top universities in China, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (such as the paper fraud by the dean of the School of Life Sciences), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure; in 2022, there was a signal of a gap in Henan's admission, but it was an isolated case in another province, with limited impact on Liaoning; disciplines such as Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, and Statistics A, among 14 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrate strong academic strength, providing strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society, highly aligned with Nankai University's Physics Category enrollment majors (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class), driving up application enthusiasm; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 143,600, roughly the same as in 2025, so the candidate scale does not create additional competitive changes; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, which is in the same northern region as Liaoning, with no obvious regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Liaoning Province is about 3.1% (24 people in 2024 out of 759 nationwide), making it a medium-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the stable appeal of the university's top tier, the high popularity of engineering majors, and the limited suppression from negative reputation events, competition is expected to continue to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 2108; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2138, with a range of 1903–2373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Physics, Quantum Information Science, Chemistry, Biological Sciences)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Digital Economy and Finance) (Digital Economy, Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Sciences, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering, Materials Chemistry, Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1903–2373, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1903), focus on aiming for top-tier majors like the Boling Class; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 2373), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering mid-range Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 326 → 415 → 373 → 290 → 321, showing overall fluctuation with a slight forward shift, and a volatile pattern in recent 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 321, which is 31 places behind 2024 (290); the enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province from 2021 to 2025 was 35, 37, 40, 40, 40 respectively, and the plan for 2026 is 33, a reduction of 7 students (-17.5%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 21st in the 2026 Soft Science ranking; the top-tier university level has a stable attraction for high-scoring liberal arts students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative (academic misconduct incident), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure; the 2022 Henan admission gap is an outlier case from another province, with limited impact on Liaoning; Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, etc., the liberal arts advantageous disciplines cover a wide range and are highly rated, strongly attracting History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law recommended (relatively hot), Chinese Language/Literature recommended (relatively hot), Finance/Economics/Economy divided and wait-and-see, highly matching with Nankai University's History Category enrollment majors (Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Finance), overall major popularity is positive; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province for 2026 is about 56,400, basically the same as 2025; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, both in the north, with no obvious regional preference; the proportion of History Category enrollment in Liaoning Province is relatively stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the volatile pattern of historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the significant enrollment reduction (-17.5%) in 2026, the stable attraction of the top-tier university level, the strong strength of liberal arts advantageous disciplines, and the positive support of major popularity, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 321; the predicted minimum ranking is about 302, with a range of 269–335.
